name: Desktops & PCs
description: Desktop computers and personal computers (PCs) are stationary computing devices designed for office, administrative, educational, and professional use. These systems typically include a system unit, monitor, keyboard, and mouse, and are commonly used for productivity applications, internet access, software development, and data processing.

name: Laptops & Portable Computers
description: Laptops and portable computers are compact, battery-powered computing devices designed for mobile use. They integrate a display, keyboard, touchpad, and internal power source into a single unit, making them suitable for remote work, field operations, presentations, and general business computing.

name: Workstations & Servers
description: Workstations and servers are high-performance computing systems designed to support advanced computational tasks, centralized data storage, virtualization, hosting services, network management, and enterprise-level applications. These devices typically provide enhanced processing power, memory capacity, reliability, and multi-user support.

name: Monitors, Screens & Display Devices
description: Monitors, screens, and display devices are visual output hardware used to display information generated by computers and other electronic systems. This category includes LCD monitors, LED displays, projectors, touchscreen displays, digital signage systems, and related visual presentation equipment.

name: UPSs, Power Supplies & Batteries
description: Uninterruptible Power Supplies (UPS), power supply units, batteries, and related power management equipment are used to provide stable electrical power, surge protection, backup power, and voltage regulation for electronic and computer systems during power interruptions or fluctuations.

name: Network Devices & Communication Equipment
description: Network devices and communication equipment are hardware components used to establish, manage, secure, and distribute computer network connectivity. This category includes routers, switches, wireless access points, modems, firewalls, network controllers, and other data communication infrastructure devices.

name: Computer Peripherals & Accessories
description: Computer peripherals and accessories are external hardware devices that enhance or extend the functionality of computer systems. This category includes keyboards, mice, printers, scanners, webcams, speakers, docking stations, external storage devices, card readers, and other supporting equipment.

name: Printers, Copiers & Scanners
description: Printers, copiers, and scanners are office productivity devices used for document printing, duplication, digitization, and imaging. This category includes laser printers, inkjet printers, multifunction printers, photocopiers, flatbed scanners, and document scanning systems.

name: Storage Devices & Backup Systems
description: Storage devices and backup systems are used for the retention, protection, and recovery of digital information. This category includes external hard drives, solid-state drives (SSD), network-attached storage (NAS), tape backup systems, flash drives, and cloud backup appliances.

name: Mobile Devices & Tablets
description: Mobile devices and tablets are portable smart electronic devices designed for communication, productivity, data access, and field operations. This category includes smartphones, tablets, rugged mobile devices, and handheld communication equipment.

name: Audio & Video Equipment
description: Audio and video equipment includes devices used for multimedia communication, conferencing, recording, and presentation purposes. This category includes microphones, speakers, webcams, conference systems, televisions, digital cameras, and video recording equipment.

name: Security & Surveillance Equipment
description: Security and surveillance equipment includes electronic systems used to monitor, secure, and protect facilities, infrastructure, personnel, and digital assets. This category includes CCTV cameras, DVR/NVR systems, biometric devices, access control systems, alarm systems, and surveillance monitoring equipment.

name: Telecommunication Equipment
description: Telecommunication equipment includes hardware used for voice, video, and data communication within and between organizations. This category includes IP phones, PBX systems, radios, satellite communication devices, VoIP systems, and related communication infrastructure.

name: Data Center & Rack Equipment
description: Data center and rack equipment includes infrastructure used to house, organize, cool, and manage enterprise computing and networking hardware. This category includes server racks, patch panels, rack-mounted equipment, cable management systems, and environmental monitoring devices.

name: Software Licenses & Digital Assets
description: Software licenses and digital assets include licensed software products, operating systems, productivity suites, security applications, subscriptions, and other digital resources managed as organizational IT assets.

name: Cables, Adapters & Connectivity Accessories
description: Cables, adapters, and connectivity accessories are supporting hardware components used to connect, extend, and integrate electronic devices and network systems. This category includes HDMI cables, Ethernet cables, USB adapters, power cords, docking adapters, and signal converters.

name: IoT & Smart Devices
description: Internet of Things (IoT) and smart devices are network-enabled electronic devices capable of collecting, transmitting, and processing data automatically. This category includes smart sensors, smart controllers, environmental monitoring devices, automation systems, and connected field equipment.

name: Laboratory & Technical Equipment
description: Laboratory and technical equipment includes specialized electronic or scientific devices used for testing, diagnostics, calibration, environmental monitoring, and technical operations. This category may include meteorological instruments, measurement devices, testing tools, and calibration systems.
